domain: Bhutanese tshachu hot springs (10 hot springs + 17 menchu + 17 drupchhu; Duenmang tshachu 4 ponds at 45/53/51/52°C each treating specific ailment; astrologer-consulted timing 16-30th day window; 1-hour bathing limit; sequential temperature-gated bathing protocol)
specific_mechanism: TSHACHU-TEMP-GATED-ROUTING: 4-temperature-tier ailment-specific inference routing with astrologer-temporal-gating + per-tier max-budget. (1) Define 4 temperature-tiers T = {τ_45 (general/cool exploration), τ_53 (factual stomach/skin), τ_51 (reasoning jaundice/migraine), τ_52 (creative skin/UTI/STI)} corresponding to 4 inference sampling temperatures. (2) Per query class, route to specific tier (classifier-determined). (3) Astrologer-gating: temporal context window (e.g., 16-30th day of month-equivalent = restrict to recent context_t-N to context_t window). (4) 1-hour limit = max-sampling-budget B per tier; on B exhaustion forced re-routing to alternative tier. (5) Differs from generic temperature sampling by explicit 4-ailment-tier mapping + temporal gating + budget-bounded re-routing.
llm_application: TSHACHU-TEMP-GATED-ROUTING 4-temperature-tier ailment-specific routing + astrologer-temporal context window + per-tier max-budget + forced re-routing. Differs from R397 BERBER-TIFINAGH (different — Tifinagh). R412 BEDOUIN-MAJLIS. R435. R444 SAMOAN-FALE. R461 KHIPU-GATE (bit-gated). R474 NADIRCLAW (multi-route). R486 KBACH-GESTURE-VOCABULARY-GATE (1500-symbol vocabulary). Differs from Router-R1 (closest — multi-round routing aggregation, but no temperature-tier + no temporal-gating + no max-budget). Multi-Turn RL LLM Agents (sequential decision). Tree Search LLM RL. Tiered LLM Inference (different — model-tier not temperature-tier). Differs by 4-TEMPERATURE-TIER + AILMENT-SPECIFIC ROUTING + ASTROLOGER-TEMPORAL CONTEXT-WINDOW GATING + PER-TIER MAX-BUDGET FORCED RE-ROUTING.
novelty_claim: Router-R1 + Multi-Turn RL + Tree Search + Tiered Inference cover multi-tier routing paradigm. TSHACHU-TEMP-GATED-ROUTING adds (a) 4-temperature-tier ailment-specific + (b) astrologer-temporal-window gating + (c) per-tier max-budget. Recombination — borderline lookup.
